applicability_notes: Unary elementwise op; golden is torch.special.polygamma(n=k, input=x). Single-op chain replacement, no weights.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.polygamma(input_tensor, k); constraints: {'k': 'integer order n of the polygamma function, passed positionally after input', 'accuracy': 'validated to ulp_threshold=1 against torch.special.polygamma at bfloat16'}

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default interleaved memory config
